summary: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA—violates stated requirement for full 40-char SHA + release-date comment. Test-Workflow.ps1 hardcodes brittle expectations: 'Tests Passed: 20' (line 124), 'Job succeeded' markers, job names. If Pester suite changes or is renamed, tests fail. PowerShell code solid (Set-StrictMode, error handling, type hints, good param validation). Well-factored module design but test harness assertions risk breakage.
